items.description: Search for documents and resources that detail the reconnaissance phase in WiFi pentesting.
Identify and list common tools used in the reconnaissance phase of WiFi pentesting.
Gather information on techniques employed during the reconnaissance phase in WiFi pentesting.
Compile findings into a structured analysis focusing on tools and techniques.
Cite all sources and references used in the analysis.
